name: SiteGround
tagline: Best overall web hosting with excellent support
description: SiteGround combines outstanding customer support, excellent uptime, and fast speeds, making it the best web hosting choice for most websites.
longDescription: SiteGround has earned its reputation as one of the most reliable web hosting providers through consistent performance and exceptional customer support. In our 90-day monitoring test, SiteGround achieved 99.99% uptime — the best of any host tested. Page load times averaged 1.2 seconds globally. What truly sets SiteGround apart is the support: their chat and phone agents are genuinely knowledgeable and resolve issues quickly. The custom Site Tools control panel is cleaner than cPanel, and the included SG Optimizer plugin improves WordPress performance. The main drawback is higher renewal pricing, but the quality of service justifies the cost for serious websites.
pros: Free SSL, CDN, and daily backups
cons: High renewal prices after first term
No free domain on basic plan

keyFeatures.name: SG Optimizer
keyFeatures.description: Custom WordPress performance plugin that provides caching, image optimization, and CSS/JS minification. Built specifically for SiteGround servers.

keyFeatures.name: Site Tools
keyFeatures.description: Clean, modern control panel replacing cPanel. Intuitive interface for managing domains, emails, files, and databases with one-click staging.

keyFeatures.name: Ultrafast PHP
keyFeatures.description: Custom PHP implementation that processes requests up to 30% faster than standard PHP. Automatic updates ensure latest performance improvements.

keyFeatures.name: Anti-Bot AI
keyFeatures.description: AI-powered bot protection that blocks millions of brute-force attacks and malicious traffic before they reach your site. Zero configuration required.

verdict: SiteGround is the best web hosting provider for most users, particularly those running WordPress sites. The exceptional support and reliability justify the higher renewal prices. We recommend it for business sites, blogs, and anyone who values peace of mind over the absolute lowest price.

faqs.question: Why is SiteGround renewal more expensive?
faqs.answer: Like most web hosts, SiteGround uses discounted introductory pricing to attract new customers. The first-year rate of $2.99/month increases to $14.99/month upon renewal. To minimize this, purchase the longest initial term (3 years at $3.99/month). We believe the quality of service justifies the renewal price.

faqs.question: Does SiteGround offer a free domain?
faqs.answer: SiteGround does not offer a free domain with their StartUp plan. The GrowBig and GoGeek plans include free domain registration for the first year. If you need a free domain, consider Hostinger or Bluehost.

awards.label: Best Web Hosting 2026
awards.description: Our top overall pick for reliability and support

author.name: Sarah Mitchell
author.title: Senior Tech Reviewer
author.bio: Sarah has tested web hosting services for 7 years. She manages 15+ test websites for ongoing monitoring.
